{{Quote|Yeah, well, I don't like hauling for desperate people. They make me nervous.|Maranne Darmic, to [[Haber Trell]]|<ref name="ST" />}}
'''Maranne Darmic''' was a [[Gender/Legends|Female]] [[Smuggler/Legends|trader]].

==Biography==
Born on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Darmic was close to her father [[Dreja Darmic]]. After he was arrested around [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], she left the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and shipped out on the first [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] she could find.<ref name="ST" />

Together with [[Haber Trell]], the two smugglers and their ship unknowingly got involved in a devious [[Capture of Zekka Thyne|scheme]] devised by none other than [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. Their [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was called the ''[[Hopskip]]''.<ref name="ST" />
